violations.description: Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. - Fish in container found thawing on counter.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Reach-in on cook line found dirty at the bottom of it, spills etc.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration . - Dishwasher at bar was found at less than 50ppm CL
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. - Box of napkins found on floor in back storage area.
Linen storage. — --Clean linen was not stored in a clean, dry location or protected from contamination. - Towels found on floor behind bar.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Hood walls need to be cleaned.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Many items in reach-ins and walk-in found undated.

Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of cooked pork in vacuum sealed bags.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Bottom of reach-in freezer needs to be cleaned.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. - Handwash station at bar has been repurposed to a water filling station with addition of water filtration. Soap has been removed.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Behind bar needs to be deep cleaned, behind trash can, floors, build up of syrups.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
